rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash. This row is clearly visible at the top right of the page (18.5.7 1/2) and was entirely missed by gpt-5-mini. The '1/2' is represented by the 'ob' symbol.

Visual reading confirms 'Jersey Fints'. The first letter is clearly a 'J', not 'F' as gemini-flash initially transcribed. 'Fints' is as written, though 'Fines' is a probable meaning in context (as gemini-flash's note suggests). gpt-5-mini misread 'Fints' as 'Fruits'.

Visual reading confirms 'Hilly Pensions' (not 'Hills') and 'nichol' (first letter in brace is 'n', not 'm'). Amounts '0 10 0' are clearly present and aligned. gemini-flash provided the correct amounts and a close description. gpt-5-mini missed the amounts and misread 'Hilly' as 'Hills', classifying it as a header.
rows.english_description: Pension receipt from Jersey (item labelled 'Hilly'), received from Nichol.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Pension receipt from Jersey (item labelled 'Hilly'), received from Nichol, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Visual reading 'Bursary & Impensis Coll: Nota Domas —'. gpt-5-mini had 'Barbary & imponij' and 'Domus', while gemini-flash had 'Nora Domas'. Changed row_type to 'header' as it's a descriptive label without an amount, consistent with gpt-5-mini's type. Combined best visual elements.

Visual reading 'Jno Sri et socij'. 'Jno' is a common abbreviation for John. This line serves as a header for the following bracketed entries and has no associated amounts. gemini-flash correctly identified it as a header. gpt-5-mini completely misread this line, assigning amounts from the next entry and an entirely incorrect description ('Pro Re et forij').

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms description and amounts '22 10 0'. gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini had the correct amounts but an entirely incorrect description for this line, 'Pro Re et forij'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt relating to South and Morton (likely rents or tithes) recorded under John S. and associates, amounting to £22 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts '182 11 3' are clear. A 'q' symbol is visible after the pence, indicating a 0.25 fraction. Both extractors got the main amounts right, but gemini-flash missed the fraction, and gpt-5-mini noted uncertainty but didn't extract it. No description text on page for this subtotal line.
Visual verification confirms description, amounts '605 5 11' and the 'ob' symbol indicating 0.5 fraction. gemini-flash correctly extracted all details. gpt-5-mini missed the fraction.

Visual verification confirms description, amounts '360 19 0' (shillings is clearly '19') and the 'q' symbol indicating 0.25 fraction. gemini-flash is correct on all points. gpt-5-mini misread shillings as '9' and missed the fraction.

rows.description: Quod residuat hic Exandbris anno Dom:
rows.notes: This row is present in the image, though heavily struck through. The transcription matches gemini-flash, which correctly identified no amounts. gpt-5-mini missed this distinct row entirely.

rows.description: Sce Introducend restat ad Dom: Rect:
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms description 'Sce Introducend restat ad Dom: Rect:' and amounts '244 10 11' with a clear 'q' symbol for 0.25 fraction. gemini-flash captured the fraction, gpt-5-mini did not and had minor description differences. gpt-5-mini's note on arithmetic discrepancy is acknowledged but the visual transcription stands.
Visual verification confirms description 'Matth: Holt Rector'. 'Holt' is clearly legible. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini indicated ambiguity but transcription was very similar.

Visual verification confirms description 'Joannes Conybeare SubR.'. 'Conybeare' and 'SubR.' are clearly legible. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini had minor spelling and abbreviation differences ('Coybeau', 'Sub? P.').
Visual verification confirms description 'Jos: Attwell'. The double 't' is clear. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini misread 'Attwell' as 'Abwell'.
Visual verification confirms description 'Thomas Bayley.' including the period. Both extractors are essentially correct, with gemini-flash being more precise on the punctuation.

Visual verification confirms description 'Augustinus Question Decanus.' including the period. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini omitted the period and noted ambiguity that was not visually significant.
Visual verification confirms description 'Th: Betty A.M.'. The first initial is clearly 'Th:', not 'Jos:'. gemini-flash is correct, gpt-5-mini misread the initial.
